plant.name: BrassCraft Manufacturing Facility
plant.description: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility spans over 50,000 square feet in the heart of India's brass manufacturing hub. The plant is designed for efficient workflow from raw material storage through machining, finishing, quality inspection, and packaging. Climate-controlled areas house precision measurement equipment and sensitive processes.

machines.name: Multi-Spindle CNC Turning Centers
machines.description: High-speed multi-spindle CNC turning centers for mass production of precision brass components with automated bar feeding and in-process gauging.

machines.name: CNC Vertical Machining Centers
machines.description: 3-axis and 4-axis CNC milling machines for complex brass component machining, secondary operations, and fixture-based production.

machines.name: Swiss-Type CNC Lathes
machines.description: High-precision Swiss-type sliding headstock lathes for small-diameter, tight-tolerance brass components used in electronics and instrumentation.

machines.name: Hot Forging Press
machines.description: Automated hot forging presses for producing brass valve bodies, fittings, and complex shapes from brass billets with near-net-shape accuracy.

machines.name: Automatic Threading Machines
machines.description: Dedicated thread cutting and rolling machines for BSP, NPT, metric, and custom thread profiles on brass components.

machines.name: Electroplating Lines
machines.description: Automated electroplating lines for nickel, chrome, tin, and gold plating with precise thickness control and environmental compliance.

qualityLab.name: Quality Assurance Laboratory
qualityLab.description: Our climate-controlled quality laboratory is equipped with the latest measuring and testing instruments to ensure every component meets exacting specifications. The lab operates under ISO 17025 guidelines with regular calibration of all instruments.

equipment.name: Coordinate Measuring Machine (CMM)
equipment.description: Zeiss CMM for 3D dimensional measurement of complex brass components with accuracy to 0.001mm.

equipment.name: Optical Comparator
equipment.description: Profile projection system for non-contact measurement and visual inspection of thread profiles and contours.

equipment.name: Spectrometer (XRF)
equipment.description: X-ray fluorescence spectrometer for rapid chemical composition analysis of brass alloys and incoming raw materials.

equipment.name: Hardness Tester
equipment.description: Rockwell and Vickers hardness testing machines for material property verification of brass components.

equipment.name: Pressure Testing Rig
equipment.description: Hydrostatic pressure testing equipment for verification of brass valves and fittings to rated pressures up to 100 bar.

equipment.name: Thread Gauges (Go/No-Go)
equipment.description: Full range of calibrated BSP, NPT, metric, and UNC/UNF thread gauges for thread verification.

equipment.name: Surface Roughness Tester
equipment.description: Portable surface roughness measurement instrument for verification of machined surface finish quality.

equipment.name: Salt Spray Chamber
equipment.description: Accelerated corrosion testing chamber for evaluating the corrosion resistance of plated and coated brass components.
